name: Glorio Cookies (Oreo Cookies) - Gloria Pitzer
recipeInstructions:
FILLING:
1 envelope unflavored gelatin
1/4 c Cold water
1 c Crisco
1 tsp Vanilla
1 lb Powdered sugar + 1 cup
Mix the cookies: Take small balls, roll them in your hands, place on a cookie sheet, and bake at 350°F for 10 to 15 minutes. Let cool, then fill with the filling mixture.
